name: @chbrain/khai-engine-psychological-safety
description: khai psychological safety engine — the interpersonal climate that determines what a persona can risk saying
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: The interpersonal climate that determines what a persona can risk saying.

card.wire: Link the scene's interpersonal climate to the anchor; link the specific safety level to the expression under Projection.
card.issue: What can a persona in this climate risk saying without losing standing?
card.require: A team or group with a history of interaction; a norm, enforced or unenforced, around speaking up.
card.enforce: Do not conflate claimed safety with real safety. Performative safety looks like high safety from the outside and functions like low safety from the inside.
card.setup: Identify the relevant prior episodes -- who spoke up, what happened, who was punished -- before assigning an expression.
